tabs.title: Live fleet positions
tabs.content: LatestByDevice | project DeviceId, PolicyId, EventTime, SpeedMph, Latitude, Longitude | take 100

tabs.title: Harsh-event hotspots
tabs.content: VehicleTelematics | where EventTime > ago(1h) | where HarshBrake or HarshAccel | summarize Events=count() by PolicyId | top 20 by Events desc

tabs.title: Streaming sample feed (Eventstream)
tabs.content: TelematicsStreamRaw | summarize Events=count() by bin(Timestamp, 1m) | order by Timestamp desc | take 30
